response:
Sure, here's a response to the email:

Subject: Follow-up on Resume for Administrative & Order Entry Specialist Position

Dear [Generic Name],

Thank you for your resume and for the opportunity to discuss the Administrative & Order Entry Specialist position with Kuebler. I am interested in scheduling a call to discuss the role and how it aligns with your career goals. Please let me know a convenient time for you.

Thank you for your time. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,  
[Generic Name]  
Vice President of Sales & Marketing North America
